sourceWitnesses.observedFact: USCCB NABRE Nehemiah 7 ends at verse 72; there is no NABRE Nehemiah 7:73 source address.
USCCB NABRE Nehemiah 8:1 begins with the seventh-month transition material.

nabre_7_72.textAnchor: took up residence in their cities
nabre_7_72.role: NABRE terminal verse for chapter 7; corresponds to settlement material carried in other traditions at Nehemiah 7:73.

nabre_7_73.role: NABRE has no source verse at Nehemiah 7:73. Absence is a verified source-address absence, not an unresolved textual gap.

nabre_8_1.textAnchor: Now when the seventh month came
nabre_8_1.role: NABRE source address for seventh-month transition and Ezra Water Gate material.

completionEffect: Removes Nehemiah 7:73 from canonical OT governed exclusions by converting it to a positive source-address alignment.
